name: Spiced Cocoa Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, stir together the flour, cocoa, baking powder, baking soda, 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon, mace, and salt.
2. In a large bowl, beat the sugar and butter until creamy. Add the egg; beat well. Gradually add the flour mixture, alternating with milk, mixing until well combined. Form into a ball of dough.
3. On a lightly floured surface, roll the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch. Cut into rings using a 2-1/2-inch doughnut cutter. Re-roll the dough as necessary.
4. Fry two or three doughnuts at a time in hot oil (375°F) for about 30 seconds, turning once with a slotted spoon. Drain on paper towels.
5. In a small bowl, stir together powdered sugar and a dash of ground cinnamon. Sprinkle over the warm doughnuts before serving.
